synced:
[00:12.07] She drank wine by the glass, not by the bottle
[00:17.11] She ain't stuck on the past, ain't worried about tomorrow
[00:21.44] She's a lover, a mother, a sister and wife
[00:25.43] She rolls over in the mornin' to the love of her life
[00:29.94] Only smokes on one vacation, says just what she thinks
[00:34.42] She don't need validation or much of anything
[00:39.05] I just wanna be her so bad, it hurts so bad, it hurts so

[00:52.08] I just wanna be her, I just wanna be her so bad-ad-ad, it hurts so bad
[01:04.68] She knows bein' rich is just a state of mind
[01:09.06] She stays talkin' to Jesus, calls her mama all the time
[01:13.35] She don't over-embellish, if she says it, then it's true
[01:17.70] I don't mean to sound jealous, but what could I do? 'Cause
[01:22.24] I just wanna be her so bad, it hurts so bad, it hurts so

[01:30.99] I just wanna be her so bad, it hurts so bad, it hurts so

[01:48.75] Take all my money, everything I have

[03:01.61] I just wanna be her, I just wanna be her so bad-ad
